title: mikania micrantha
intro: Mikania micrantha, also known as the Java tear or Matico, is a type of flowering vine native to Southeast Asia. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Mikania micrantha include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of creams, ointments, or poultices.
